title: Towgarmah #8425
definition:
Togarmah = "thou wilt break her"

 n pr m
 1) son of Gomer, grandson of Japheth, and great grandson of Noah

 n pr terr
 2) territory settled by the descendants of Togarmah
    2a) probably the area known as Armenia

 n pr m
